title: Origon Optimized 1.21.11
description: Origon Optimized runs faster thanks to modern performance mods. All mods are carefully selected and tuned to run safely and quickly on any device, both in single worlds and on servers!
body:
### 🪻 **Origon Optimized** is a carefully tuned modpack designed for those who want to improve the performance of Minecraft without losing the quality of the game. The mods included in the build are specially selected to ensure stability and speed up the game both in single worlds and on servers.


**💊 Main features:**

⚙️ High Performance: All mods have been carefully tuned to maximize performance speed, regardless of your device.

👫 Optimized for multiplayer: The modpack is specially adapted for multiplayer servers, thanks to mods such as PlasmoVoice and Emotecraft, which improve interaction between players and add new possibilities for communication.



📗 This modpack is suitable for both experienced players and beginners who want to optimize gameplay without complicated settings. Just install and enjoy the improved performance!
